title: hierochloe tongo
intro: Hierochloe tongo, also known as Māori's tea or Long-leafed Wire Grass, is a perennial grass native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hierochloe tongo include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Hierochloe tongo can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and is also used in traditional Māori medicine in the form of a poultice or infusion.
